title: Categorical Association Heatmap
objective: Measure pairwise association strength among categorical predictors and target.
method: Computed Cramer's V for categorical/ordinal fields using contingency tables.
results: Top categorical association with binary target is num (Cramer's V 1.000).
warnings: Missing values and site-level sampling differences may affect all estimates.
Cramer's V does not establish causality and includes missingness as an explicit category.
